description:
Add a `buildToolchain` function to `lib/default.nix` that:
- Takes `toolbox`, `pkgs`, `name`, and `data.json path`
- Reads data.json via `readData`
- Builds a `symlinkJoin` for each version, resolving component names directly against `toolbox`
- Returns `{ versions; default; }`

This replaces the per-package mkToolchain + components pattern. Component names in data.json already match toolbox package names, so no explicit mapping is needed.
title: Add buildToolchain helper to lib/default.nix
